name: AIGA Austin
description: AIGA is the professional association for design. We connect our creative community through programming that inspires, educates and advocates for design.

name: AIGA Houston
description: This is the place to connect and get involved with the design community in Houston. It is also a great place to stay up to date with AIGA Houston and the folks you’ve met at our events.

name: Aligned Pixels
description: A friendly Slack team for discussion about design and related topics, hosted by Matt Kelsh and Marc Edwards.

name: API Who Design
description: API (Asian & Pacific Islanders) Who Design is a living and growing directory that features API creatives in the design industry. Our mission is to highlight the breadth of talent within the API population, inspire new designers, connect with fellow APIs, share experiences, and help with the discovery of fresh talent for expanding teams.

name: Architechie
description: Our world is changing more from software than skyscrapers, and as keepers of culture, architects need to be involved. We're an intrepid band of architects now working in the tech industry and helping others do the same. We host events, workshops, and throw a killer happy hour.

name: Austin UX
description: Nine years of local design RTs, and a welcome mat for the Austin design community. Run by (award-winning mentor!) @vitor_io.

name: Austin UXPA
description: Austin UXPA is a local chapter of the User Experience Professionals Association (UXPA).

name: Better Product Community
description: Connect with product leaders and practitioners to learn and share what it takes to design, build, market, and sell better products.

name: Better Web Type
description: Better Web Type is a web typography course/community for web designers and web developers. Join to see what's new in the world of web typography, from cool fonts to tutorials and everyday type geek chats.

name: Bitcoin Design
description: The Bitcoin Design Community Slack is an open space to discuss and explore everything Bitcoin and design. Open standards are part of our foundation, so all of our work can also be found on Github.

name: Black UX Austin
description: The Black UX Austin Slack is a closed space for people of African ancestry (who may identify as Black) to meet other Black user experience professionals in Austin to build a community and thriving network.

name: Black UX Austin
description: A community for Black UX professionals in Austin to meet, discuss their craft, share stories, and uplift each other in research, design, and product development.

name: Blacks Who Design
description: Blacks Who Design highlights all of the inspiring Black designers in the industry. The goal is to inspire new designers, encourage people to diversify their feeds, and discover amazing individuals to join your team.

name: BLKBK
description: We're a non-profit community of freelance graphic, motion, product, brand, interface, experience designers, developers, illustrators, strategists and makers based in the UK, Europe & USA.

name: Boston UX
description: The most active and largest collaborative UX group in Boston. We use Slack to stay in touch, help each other and foster positive community. UX Boston.

name: Brooklyn Product Design
description: We are a meetup that aims to connect Brooklyn's product design community together through curiosity and shared learning via speaker talks, social events, and hackathon events in a safe space.

name: Calgary UX
description: Calgary UX aims to inspire and connect user experience professionals across all disciplines and industries in Calgary. An open UX community for better interactions & more human connections.

name: Clube de UI (daTheStarter)
description: Largest online UX Design community in Portugal. Workshops, webinars, competitions, free mentorship, and much more.

name: Content + UX
description: A community of professionals celebrating content strategy, content itself, and its role in the user experience. Join more than 4,000 content and content-adjacent professionals who support each other, share knowledge and understanding, and help shape the field of content strategy.

name: CreateRemote
description: CreateRemote is a design and development community of creators. We aim to empower creators to learn, give back, and achieve. It is a community led group for the community.

name: Creative Huddle
description: Creative Huddle is an inclusive community for creatives from every path of life. Regardless of your background or skill level, there is a space for you. The Huddle was created keeping in mind creatives of all sorts, from designers to filmmakers, actors to architects, and many more.

name: Creative Tokyo
description: We're the biggest creative community on Meetup in Tokyo, with 2800+ members and 1050+ on Slack. We connect creatives with peers and projects :)

name: DCUX
description: DCUX is an expertly curated collection of the District’s UX, design, and creative news + events. The region’s professional design community and annual conference by @uxpadc and @round.

name: Delta CX
description: The Delta CX community of "Low Ego Action Heroes" offers free peer and expert help, support, and advice across CX/UX research, content, information architecture, interaction design, and strategy.

name: Design Buddies
description: Design Buddies is an inclusive community for anyone in or interested in design. There are events, resources, support, collaborations, and networking opportunities.

name: Design Friends
description: Tools, Design Systems, workflows, people. Streaming from Munich, Germany. Join us!

name: Design Gigs for Good
description: Design Gigs for Good is a free community-driven resource to help more people use the tools of design to create positive social change.

name: Design in Focus
description: The mission of Design in Focus is to demonstrate the value of CID through engaging with those in the field and finding supporting evidence such as statistics and cases. ​ The vision of Design in Focus is to have a channel for and by CID people to not only engage within their networks, but also to provide valuable info that can help bring their relative stakeholders along on topics related to CID.

name: Design Leaders Team
description: Design Leaders is the place for experienced and practising design leaders to come together and level-up one another.

name: Design Leadership
description: A Swedish Community for Design Leaders. The purpose of the community is to share experience & knowledge about leadership in the context of design.

name: Design Leadership Forum
description: Our mission is to advance the practice of design leadership by fostering a community where the world’s best can learn from one another. We strive to make the Forum inclusive and relevant to those confronting the challenges of leading design teams.

name: Design Ops Italia
description: Design Ops Italia è la comunità italiana sul design ops. Nata per raccogliere idee, contributi e contenuti sul design ops si pone l'obiettivo di diffondere la cultura del design ops in Italia

name: Design Sprints APAC
description: Design Sprint APAC is a community of design sprint practitioners, leaders and enthusiasts. We discuss ideas, problems, and events happening within the Asia-Pacific region. Whether you're working here, living here, or just interested in connecting with the APAC community, everyone is welcome to join.

name: Design System University
description: Participate in facilitated weekly prompts + monthly guest talks and open working sessions to level up your design system knowledge.

name: Design Systems France
description: La communauté dédiée aux créateurs de Design Systems. Construire, apprendre, partager.

name: Design Systems Slack
description: The purpose of the Design Systems Slack to promote the discussion of design systems, style guides, component libraries, and pattern libraries.

name: Design to Combat COVID-19
description: We are an all-volunteer based organization. We need you and whatever skills/experiences you have to help combat COVID-19.

name: Design:ES
description: Nos gusta la Ñ en la palabra "diseño". Aquí nos juntamos en Slack para hablar sobre diseño –en español– y mejorar en comunidad.

name: Designed.org
description: The first 501(C)(3) non-profit to build a platform dedicated to empowering the designers of tomorrow through educational resources, career tools and mentoring!

name: Designer Hangout
description: Designer Hangout is the world's #1 UX design community. Find UX jobs, mentorship, design resources, and real-time user experience design conversation.

name: Designers Lounge
description: a WhatsApp group for designers

name: DesignersDAO
description: A community helping designers to attain global standards, transitioning more designers into web3 and advocating for design and UX in web3.

name: Designership
description: Join the #1 community of creatives. Share, learn and grow with over 2,000+ active designers and makers from all over the world.

name: DesignerUp Mindful Design Pro
description: The community where mindful UX/UI and product designers come to grow, share and connect.

name: DesignOps
description: The DesignOps community helps you connect with others, share your experiences and level up your craft. The most dangerous design meetup in Melbourne.

name: DesignOps Community
description: Join over 4,000 like-minded people interested in Design and Research Operations

name: DesignSocialClub.
description: 🌍 A global social club where designers thrive — sign up to the Slack group and join in 👇 all your friends are there!

name: DesignX
description: Elevating Design & Designers Across The Globe Join 5000+ designers & leaders and gain access to our global community, conference talks, and reports that you won’t find anywhere else.

name: Distant Community
description: Distant is a vibrant, vulnerable digital community that inspires easy-going exchange. Composed of a diverse set of makers, artists, and creatives—industry, years of experience, POV, and career ambitions considered—it’s a space where people can learn from others and learn with others.

name: Email Geeks
description: The Slack community where email marketers, designers, and developers meet to talk shop.

name: Fenders
description: A community for people who love the web! Join us on Slack or at one of our events.

name: Figma Italia
description: benvenut* su Figma Italia, la prima community italiana dedicata ai designer che utilizzano Figma.

name: Floc*
description: Somos un estudio descentralizado de creativos, inconformistas y soñadores que forman un colectivo libre y adaptable para ayudar a las personas que buscan mejorar la sociedad.

name: Flow
description: A Slack community for Flow, Professional iOS UI Animation and Web Animation Software. Import from Sketch, animate with our powerful timeline editor, generate production-ready code.

name: Floxies
description: Our mission is to support each other on our Design and Webflow Development journey. ‍ We share our knowledge, learn from speakers across the world and grow together by practicing during our hands-on sessions. You will feel like a part of a supportive team where you will be able to create meaningful relationships with incredibly talented people.

name: Framer
description: Get feedback and quick help with your projects in our online communities, or attend a meetup to learn Framer with fellow prototypers in person.

name: Friends of Figma
description: A Slack community with over 1500 Figmates. We talked about anything related to Figma, design, remote work, or just about anything.

name: frontdrop
description: We help you to make it better. Forget about hours of coding and get clean code for web apps and frameworks like React, Vue and Svelte as fast as you say cheese.

name: Growth Designers
description: Growth design is the joint practice of growth and design. Designers who not only solve for customer pain but do so in a way that grows businesses.

name: Hamburg Designers
description: Working to enable, empower & connect the #designcommunity in #hamburg • Come join us / Local Hamburg Designers

name: HCI Professionals Association Of India
description: HCIPAI represents a community of academicians and professionals active in the area of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) in India. It focuses on sharing peer-reviewed knowledge in the discipline of HCI based design and research by providing relevant platforms for different stakeholders.

name: Hexagon UX
description: Hexagon is a non-profit organization aimed to empower and support womxn and non-binary folx in UX through our community, events, and mentorship around the world.

name: Humanitarian Designers
description: TO CONNECT, ADVISE, STAND AND ACT. We are the link between committed designers and NGOs.

name: Inclusive Design Jam
description: We're a global learning community of changemakers committed to making access and use of products, services and environments equal to all. We empower changemakers to design for inclusion, equity and justice through learning, knowledge transfer, and ongoing practice.

name: Indian Design Community
description: We're a group of UI, UX, graphic and product designers based in India.

name: IterateUX
description: We’re a passionate group of UXers (UX/UI designers, researchers, managers, and recruiters) from around the world. Our community is built with you in mind.

name: IxDA
description: The Interaction Design Association (IxDA) is a member-supported organization dedicated to the discipline of interaction design. Since its launch in 2003, IxDA has grown into a global network of more than 100,000 individuals and over 200 local groups.

name: IxDA Atlanta
description: IxDA Atlanta is the local chapter of the Interaction Design Association. Since 2009, we've put on design slams, socials, film screenings, UX show & tells, and hosted local and national speakers from the professional and academic communities.

name: IxDA Santiago
description: IxDA Santiago es el capítulo local de la Interaction Design Association para Santiago de Chile y funciona desde junio de 2011.

name: Joint Frontiers
description: A community of makers and thinkers currently under transformation to address new challenges.

name: Just Us Collective
description: The Just Us Collective is a non-profit community of illustrators & designers. Whether you are a student or professional practitioner – our aim is to create a platform for creatives to network and collaborate with other designers/ illustrators.

name: LA Design and Dev
description: LA Design and Dev is a Slack community of over 3,000+ people offering networking, job postings and topical discussion in Los Angeles County. During non-COVID times, we host quarterly meet-ups around the city.

name: Ladies that UX
description: A community of women in UX who support each other, push the UX boundaries, and promote skill and talent

name: Ladies that UX Austin
description: We are a group of enthusiastic ladies who inspire, empower and support each other in a safe and casual environment. We encourage women who work in or are interested in the field of User Experience to join us to form a family of ladies that UX Austin.

name: Ladies That UX em Português
description: Uma comunidade de mulheres em UX que se apóiam, ultrapassam os limites da UX e promovem as habilidades e talentos femininos.

name: Latinxs Who Design
description: A directory of thriving Latinxs in the design industry. A place to find outstanding people to follow, look for a mentor, make new friends, or discover talented people to join your team.

name: Leaders of Awesomeness
description: A lively community of UX leaders, designers, researchers, and writers from all over the world.

name: Leading Design
description: A supportive community nurturing design leadership through inspiring and engaging events, conferences and retreats

name: Memorisely
description: Memorisely is an online tech campus educating career switchers and product teams in UX/UI Design & coding. Connect with over 11,000+ UX/UI designers in 150+ countries.

name: Mind the Product
description: Join 20,000+ product people in the world’s most dynamic Slack community for anyone who cares about building products people love.

name: Mixed Methods
description: Mixed Methods is a community interested in the hows and whys of user experience research. Through interviews with industry experts and hands-on trial and error, we indulge and celebrate curiosity.

name: Montréal Design Club
description: A monthly event series highlighting inspiring designers from all backgrounds.

name: Montreal Interactive
description: Created in 2016 and previously named Sketch MTL, Montreal Interactive is a local community for digital designer. We organize events and workshops to help, with meaningful knowledge, every designer to become better.

name: Nomads Talk
description: ​Join our slack community and connect with fellow digital nomads. Explore new places around you by connecting with other digital nomads around you. Plan Your trips with other nomads in you city. Our specific channel for each city will let you find nomads in your city.

name: opsididitagain
description: This group is a London based community of early stage designers, discussing their ideas, problems they face, general life and sharing useful resources with each other.

name: Orlando Designers
description: A Slack community of designers, cultivators, artists, and creators from the Orlando area.

name: Overflow Community
description: A community for Overflow. The world’s first user flow diagramming tool tailored for designers. Build and present beautiful user flow diagrams that tell a story.

name: PhillyCHI
description: PhillyCHI connects the local UX community by organizing monthly educational and networking events. We welcome anyone interested in UX to attend an event, share their knowledge, and engage with other professionals, students, and enthusiasts.

name: Practical Service Design
description: One of our missions at Practical Service Design is to build community. To practice to create a safe, low-barrier-to-entry space for people to connect around all sorts of things service design.

name: Practical UX
description: An open community of professional designers where UX knowledge is shared

name: ProApp Learn Design
description: We have built a product called Pro that helps people get started with design. You can learn different design fundamentals from our app. This community is built on the similar grounds of sharing and learning.

name: Product Hive
description: We are a community of product managers, strategists and designers in Utah. We exist to help each other learn, contribute, and connect through volunteer-led opportunities.

name: Product Tribes
description: An invite-only community of 10,000+ experienced designers, developers, and PMs. Expand your network and progress your career.

name: QTBIPOC Design
description: We strive to instill confidence in our community by empowering the next generation of QTBIPOC (queer, trans, Black, Indigenous, and people of color) with the knowledge and tools to excel within the design industry.

name: Relume Library
description: Access the world’s largest library of Webflow components and build better websites in hours, not days. Share work, seek support, vote on components, stay updated and network with other Lumers.

name: Research by Learners
description: A learning community for growing researchers, designers and product people.

name: ResearchOps
description: We’re a global group of people who’ve come together to discuss the operations and operationalization of user research and design research — also known as ResearchOps. ResearchOps includes the people, mechanisms, and strategies that set research in motion.

name: Seoul Startups
description: Seoul Startups is an English-speaking startup community for expats and Koreans in Seoul. We are a community of designers, developers, marketers and entrepreneurs in Korea.

name: Service Design Club
description: 🔎 Consultas, charlas, proyectos y networking 📚 Somos manijas del UX y Service Design Súmate a nuestra comunidad en Discord!👇🏼

name: Service Design Community
description: SDN offers a community platform for service designers around the globe, with direct community interaction, discussion and knowledge sharing. It will also benefit from the unmatched depth of the SDN’s existing resources.

name: She Code Africa
description: We are a non-profit organization focused on celebrating and empowering young Girls and Women in Technology across Africa. To build a community that embodies technical growth, networking, mentorship and visibility amongst all level career roles in Technology.

name: Slack Platform Community
description: Join this Slack Platform Community group to connect with other developers, builders, designers, and product managers who are interested in building the future of work. We get together to talk about what we’ve built, check out new platform releases, and learn from each other.

name: SoulDoodles
description: SoulDoodles community shares stories from the paths of other illustrators and artists to inspire you. In addition, we promote creativity; we have monthly illustration challenges and fun IGTV's. Join us!

name: Spokane UX
description: We're a community dedicated to bringing people interested in User Experience (UX) field and topics in the Spokane area together. Each and every member of this community is encouraged to contribute their knowledge just as much as they may learn from others.

name: Stark Community
description: Kickstart conversation, get feedback and help, share resources, tips and tricks around all things design, A11y, diversity and inclusion.

name: Supercharge Design
description: Are you ready to join a design community of like-minded people? Grow your network by connecting with other wickedly talented product designers!

name: Sustainable UX Network
description: We are SUX, a community of more than 3000 designers worldwide. Together we want to discuss, develop and exchange ideas on how we can promote and facilitate sustainability in and through our creative work.

name: Tampa Bay Designers
description: Tampa Bay Designers is a collective of UX designers, illustrators, web designers, and more with the goal of sharing knowledge, feedback, and job opportunities.

name: TECH404
description: TECH404 is a group of chat channels for Atlanta area developers, designers, marketers, business people, hobbyists, students, and other professionals involved in technology.

name: The Cacatoès Theory
description: Bienvenue sur The Cacatoès Theory le site fait pour, et par des designers. Ici tu trouveras des ressources pour t'informer, des challenges hebdomadaire pour progresser avec l'aide la communauté.

name: The Collective Studio
description: We are a team of creatives and developers who collaborate remotely together. Our purpose is to engage UX design students and professionals of all backgrounds by offering them a place to grow, share ideas on meaningful topics and make friends.

name: The Designer’s Toolbox
description: Join over 550 designers working together in building a career in UX. Get feedback, take a look at our job board, and join free monthly Design Hangouts to learn together.

name: TheSignOf
description: Stiamo creando una community, podcast, meetup e tanto altro ancora. Il nostro obiettivo? Diffondere notizie e informazioni sul Design Digitale in tutta Italia.

name: Triangirls
description: Not your average women in tech community Triangirls is a community for women and non-binary people who work in Tech. The community and events are run voluntarily by Rachael Grocott, Liz Hamburger, Katrina Dargel and Liv Denyer.

name: Triangles
description: A Slack community for designers in and around London.

name: uiFromMars
description: Un lugar construido exclusivamente para diseñador@s UI/UX y de producto que buscan crecer día tras día :)

name: UnicornClub.dev
description: The go-to hangout for design-savvy devs and code-loving designers Dive into a vibrant community of fellow unicorns, ready to share, learn, and celebrate your creative magic.

name: United Designers
description: We are United Designers, a not-for-profit global community of over four hundred designers and developers who share a passion for creating.

name: UUD
description: One-stop destination to fulfil UXUI Designers aspirations! / Resources, Inspiration, Community, Education, Network ... / UXUIデザイナーの願いをすべて叶える、ワンストップのスペース！

name: UW/UX
description: UW/UX is a student organization committed to growing the user experience and product design community at the University of Waterloo. Our mission is to empower designers to educate and inspire each other through events, workshops, and mentorship opportunities.

name: UX Flupa
description: Communauté d'UX designers francophones, l'association FLUPA organise les UX Days, UX Camp et des événements UX dans plus d'une dizaine de villes francophones.

name: UX Hel
description: UXHel (formerly UXify) is Helsinki’s hands-on UX community, which promotes Helsinki’s design learning events, collaboratively organises meetup sessions to exchange skills and learn from one another.

name: UX in ATX
description: UX in ATX is designed to teach, mentor, and build the skills of UX professionals, as well as aspiring UX designers in Austin and well beyond! Our events will vary from portfolio reviews to whiteboarding challenges and expert speakers.

name: UX Indonesia
description: UXiD (UX Indonesia) adalah sebuah komunitas terbuka nirlaba seputar User Experience (Pengalaman Pengguna). Komunitas terbuka untuk pegiat dan penyuka User Experience Design (Rancang Pengalaman Pengguna) di Indonesia.

name: UX Mastery
description: We're a community of learners, practitioners, mentors and design leaders with a common interest in user experience and human-centred design. Together we share and help each other grow the skills needed for a successful career in the user experience profession.

name: UX of EdTech
description: UX of EdTech: An exploration of user experience in the EdTech space. Reach out to Alicia Quan with your reason for joining and your connection to education/EdTech.

name: UX Research and Strategy
description: UX Research and Strategy is a registered 501c3 organization, and was founded by three former co-workers who saw a gap in the local UX market. Based on community feedback, they formed a group that is dedicated to teaching topics in UX research and strategy.

name: UX Seattle
description: A resource for user experience professionals in the greater Seattle and Puget Sound area.

name: Uxcel Community
description: Learn new design skills, assess and measure your knowledge, and connect with designers from around the world.

name: UXPA Boston
description: The Boston Chapter of the User Experience Professionals’ Association is a highly active community for persons with individual and professional interests in usability, user experience design, and their many related fields.

name: Vancouver Design Community
description: Vancouver Design Community is a community that provides a safe space for designers to connect, share knowledge, and elevate their careers. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment that supports diversity, creativity, and innovation. Our community brings together creatives from all over Vancouver to form a genuine support network.

name: Vector Design Community
description: A community where people can share ideas, review resumes and portfolios, and look for job opportunities.

name: Webflow Community
description: A non official Webflow community for people who enjoy Webflow.

name: Where are the Black Designers?
description: Where are the Black Designers is an initiative and platform for Black designers. By connecting designers, educators, and creative leaders we host a dialogue about change, both in and out of the design industry.

name: Women in Technology
description: Our group is a safe, confidential space for women who work in technology to chat and support each other. Please consider joining us whether you are new to the tech industry or you are a long-time practitioner.

name: XR-Design
description: A group of designers interested in XR Design and the future of AR/VR/XR tech in the design industry.

name: ZAProductDesign
description: #ZAPD is South Africa's first community Slack chat platform just for digital product designers. We now have a dedicated community space where we can connect, share advice and ideas, mentor each other, organise industry events, and collaborate creatively to push the industry forward.

name: Zheroes
description: Zheroes is a Slack channel for the zeroheight community. Here you can ask questions about design systems, share tips and tricks, and learn how others are managing their design systems.
